content.summary: Iterative Health (iterative.health) is a Cambridge, MA-based healthcare technology and services company founded in 2017 by Dr. Jonathan Ng, focused on accelerating clinical research through a combination of AI, expert staffing, and centralized operations. The company operates a 100+ site global clinical research network spanning GI, hepatology, cardiology, and obesity therapeutic areas across North America, Europe, India, and Australia. Its proprietary SKOUT® AI platform received FDA clearance for real-time AI-assisted polyp detection during colonoscopy and demonstrated a 27% improvement in adenoma detection in a randomized clinical trial. In April 2026, Iterative Health closed a $77 million Series C round led by Intrepid Growth Partners and GV (Google Ventures), joined by EDBI and existing investors Insight Partners and Obvious Ventures — bringing known cumulative funding to approximately $272M+. The company reports 250+ employees worldwide (187 on LinkedIn) and is actively hiring engineers, data scientists, and site operations staff. Key buying signals include: fresh Series C capital actively being deployed, a technology/data infrastructure build-out (Salesforce, SQL/data warehouse, Power BI/Looker, Python/R), aggressive site network expansion into cardiology via acquisitions (NextStage Clinical Research, Waco Cardiology), and new strategic partnerships with GI Alliance, One GI, US Heart & Vascular, and Gastroenterology Associates of NJ. The company is led by Founder/CEO Jonathan Ng (MBBS), President/CFO Bill Kayser, COO Dana Feuchtbaum, and a full VP-level management team of 11 with deep clinical trial and AI expertise.
content.industry: Healthcare Technology & Services — Clinical Research / AI-Powered GI & Multispecialty Clinical Trial Network
tech_stack: SKOUT® — proprietary FDA-cleared real-time AI polyp detection platform (endoscopic video AI/ML, computer vision)
AI/ML (deep learning for endoscopic image analysis, patient pre-screening algorithms)
Enterprise Data Warehouse (Snowflake / BigQuery / Redshift — in use per job postings)
Salesforce CRM (confirmed in use per Director Analytics job posting)
content.headquarters: 675 Massachusetts Ave, 8th Floor, Cambridge, MA 02139 (also New York, NY)

Obvious Ventures (Series B & Series C participant)
EDBI / SG Growth Capital (Series C new investor)
content.total_funding: $77 million Series C closed April 30, 2026 (prior rounds bring total to approximately $272M+ including the $195M raised through early 2023)
buying_signals: ACTIVE FUNDING DEPLOYMENT: Closed $77M Series C on April 30, 2026 (led by GV/Google Ventures and Intrepid Growth Partners) — capital actively being deployed for technology, headcount, and geographic expansion

TECHNOLOGY MIGRATION: Building out data/analytics infrastructure from scratch — hiring Staff Data Engineer, Staff Data Scientist, Staff Software Engineer, and Director Analytics; replacing manual spreadsheets with self-serve data warehouse reporting
ACTIVE HIRING: Multiple open roles in Cambridge MA and New York NY — engineering, analytics, people operations, research site management — signaling aggressive team expansion

MARKET EXPANSION: Entered cardiology in 2025–2026, acquiring cardiology sites from NextStage Clinical Research (May 2026) and Waco Cardiology (June 2026); expanding from GI/hepatology to obesity and cardiology

NETWORK SCALING: Site network grew to 100+ globally across North America, Europe, India, Australia; new strategic partnerships with GI Alliance (80 sites), One GI (34 clinics), US Heart & Vascular, and Gastroenterology Associates of NJ (July 8, 2026)

LEADERSHIP CHANGE: New VP Engineering Evan Estola recently hired; new Chief of Staff to CEO Brianna Kemm; new Board member (Ajay Agrawal, Intrepid) and Board observer (Anthony Philippakis, GV) added post-Series C

PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT: Building 'next generation of AI' for clinical research including AI-powered pre-screening tools and data-driven operational infrastructure — actively seeking senior technical talent
PHARMA/BIOTECH PARTNERSHIPS: 40+ pharma, biotech, medical device, and CRO sponsor partners — ecosystem of buyers actively engaged
content.headcount_estimate: 250+ employees worldwide (LinkedIn shows 187 indexed profiles; company-stated figure is 250+ as of 2025–2026)
